title: All I Have to Do Is Dream
album: The Very Best of The Everly Brothers
why_this_song: All I Have to Do Is Dream by The Everly Brothers (1958) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 26 times; first heard in: "Dream, dream, dream, dream"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "When I want you in my arms"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Whenever I want you, all I have to do is"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "When I feel blue in the night"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "And I need you to hold me tight"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: When I want you in my arms
When I want you and all your charms
I need you so that I could die

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dream" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dream" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "want" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "want" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "All I Have to Do Is Dream" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "All I Have to Do Is Dream", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "All I Have to Do Is Dream" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "All I Have to Do Is Dream" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "All I Have to Do Is Dream", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "All I Have to Do Is Dream", o que aconteceria?
